name: dark-pattern-detection
description: Dark Pattern Detection - Integrated Dark Pattern Detection System

scripts.prestart: powershell -Command "Get-Process python, ngrok -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Stop-Process -Force; exit 0"
scripts.dev-all: npx concurrently -n BACKEND,ADMIN,CLIENT,TUNNEL -c magenta,yellow,cyan,green "npm run backend" "npm run frontend-admin" "npm run frontend-client" "npm run tunnel"
scripts.dev-client: npx concurrently -n BACKEND,CLIENT -c magenta,cyan --kill-others "npm run backend" "npm run frontend-client"
scripts.dev-admin: npx concurrently -n BACKEND,ADMIN -c magenta,yellow --kill-others "npm run backend" "npm run frontend-admin"
